data.name: Sex City: 2069
data.detailed_description:
Can you feel the electricity in the air? Welcome to the futuristic world of Sex City: 2069 where technology and pleasure converge as you’re trying to solve a mysterious conspiracy.



You’ll be playing as a charming female protagonist finding her own way through a world filled with cybernetics, tension, struggle and intriguing adult-oriented content. You’ll discover yourself immersed in a near but advanced future where people tend to live out their wildest desires through the possibilities technology provides. Your past is mysterious, your abilities are enigmatic, and your goal is clear as a day, although it’s always night here.



The game combines classic shooter gameplay with an adult story and interactive 18+ scenes - so you better be always ready for some action!

Features:
  • Highly interactable adult scenes that work in runtime to push the boundaries of the genre.
  • Intriguing storyline that makes you dive into a narrative filled with twists and turns.
  • Smart enemy AI to enhance player experience even further - face off against a variety of enemies from snipers to melee fighters - and each one’s trying to
  • outsmart you!
  • Diverse weapon choice - choose from a range of weapons combined with cyber-enhancements to find your own combat style.
  • Thrilling missions that explode with high-energy action.
  • Juicy soundtrack to navigate the city and the fights the smoothest way possible.
  • Strategic combat - shooting isn’t enough, use your strategic thinking to overcome enemies before they do.
  • A lot of hot 18+ scenes to unlock and enjoy.
  • Get on an adrenaline ride through the non-stop action this place provides!

    Prepare for an unforgettable adventure in Sex City: 2069! Your heroine holds the power to change the world around - are you ready to take on the challenge?

data.short_description: Sex City: 2069 is a third-person cyberpunk shooter, you'll embody a captivating female protagonist amidst an atmosphere of cyberpunk and science fiction. Prepare yourself for adult-oriented content as you dive into the depths of this virtual city.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel Core I5-8400 or similar
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1650 or akin
  • 儲存空間: 14 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-10600 or similar
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1660 SUPER GAMING OC 6G or akin
  • 儲存空間: 14 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 or above
  • Processor: Intel Core I5-8400 or similar
  • Memory: 6 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1650 or akin
  • Storage: 14 GB available space
